creator: saper@saper.info
text:
Created attachment 155311
Upgrade heirloom-doctools to 150406

Update to 150406

- Switch the upstream project from SF heirloom to github heirloom-doctools
- We no longer need the man1b patch
- otfdump got renamed so we don't need CONFLICTS anymore
 
I have sucessfully built 150406 on 8.4, 9.3 and 10.1 using poudriere on amd64 and i386.
